steps.t: The wharf master has asked you to speak with Londring to see if anyone has come by to borrow tools or use the workbench. Londring is in the Artisans' …
Londring had a rude encounter with Yârlag, who seems to have gone in search of a horse. You should check the stables near Harper's Court to see if any…
Mellien also had a rude encounter with Yârlag, who ran off towards Harper's Court. You should look for Yârlag in Dol Amroth's Harper's Court.
While searching for Yârlag, you discovered a spilled mug of ale. You should investigate the mug. The mug is in Harper's Court, in Dol Amroth.
While searching Harper's Court, you found and defeated Yârlag. You should let the wharf master know that he will no longer be sabotaging the Rosigil o…
